title: antidesma cuspidatum var. cuspidatum
intro: Antidesma cuspidatum var. cuspidatum, also known as the small-leaved Chinese millingtonia or Chinese millingtonia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Antidesma cuspidatum var. cuspidatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for topical application, and in some cultures, it is also used in traditional medicine preparations.
